creator: fschuerfeld@trivago.de
text:
stunnel port does not have ability to add x-forwared-for header.
There is a patch, but it is not part of the port.

Fix: make fetch
make extract

apply the patch manually 

https://gist.github.com/rraptorr/5599557/raw/0f1335bb9bdb37886d1634d27104a51e90d38c1c/stunnel-4.56-xforwarded-for.diff

make install

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: make install
